title: callitriche verna var. elegans
intro: Callitriche verna var. elegans, also known as spring waterwort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of spring waterwort include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of spring waterwort include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
